title: Review and merge Architecture CRs + document agentic-embed
description: Two pending CRs (cr-1775579949939, cr-1775580105000) request documenting tunnel, CLI, HTTPS, VAD in ARCHITECTURE.md — sections 5-8 are already present. The only missing piece is agentic-embed runtime integration (embed.js + adapters/). Add a section documenting agentic-embed's role in the architecture, its vector embedding capability (bge-m3), and how memory.js uses it for semantic search. Mark both CRs as reviewed/merged.
